scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend-api && npm install --prefix frontend-web
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm --prefix backend-api run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend-web run dev"
scripts.dev:windows: powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd backend-api; npm run start:dev'; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd frontend-web; npm run dev'"
